assertionResults.observation: Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Changing any bound updates bin ID, active-bin delta, normalized quote-per-base price, inverse price, and range selection consistently.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Unequal token decimals are normalized before price-to-bin and bin-to-price conversion.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Round trips use the representable bin price and disclose rounding rather than presenting an unattainable exact price.

Public issue #34 and PR #50 exact head 756451101506087b8d73f0c829529159c7afa042 record SDK 42/42 and hosted run 29184758002 covering unequal decimals, inverse and extreme prices, range boundaries, presets, keyboard, mobile, and 200 percent reflow.
